name: PFASGroups
summary: A comprehensive cheminformatics package for automated detection, classification, and analysis of halogenated substances, with a focus on per- and polyfluoroalkyl substances (PFAS). Combines SMARTS pattern matching, molecular formula constraints, and graph-based pathfinding to identify 119 groups. Supports creations of embeddings with graph metrics for Machine Learning workflows.
author: Luc T. Miaz
